title: Daily Current Affairs Roundup
content: A daily overview of major developments in policy, economy, international relations and science.

title: India–Israel Ties: From Tactical Engagement to Structural Partnership
content:
In an increasingly volatile West Asian region, India–Israel relations have evolved from cautious engagement into a deep strategic partnership spanning defence, technology, agriculture and innovation. Shared security challenges and complementary capabilities have moved the relationship from simple arms trade to joint development and co-production.

Key Idea: India’s pragmatic diplomacy balances regional sensitivities while pursuing strategic autonomy and national interest.

Evolution of India–Israel Relations

Phase I: Ideological Estrangement (1948–1992)
  • India followed Non-Alignment and supported Arab causes.
  • India recognized Israel in 1950 but avoided full diplomatic ties.
  • Israel quietly helped India during the 1965 and 1971 wars.
Phase II: Prudent Rapprochement (1992–2014)
  • Full diplomatic relations established in 1992.
  • Israel supported India during the Kargil War (1999).
  • Defense cooperation and agricultural projects began expanding.
Phase III: Strategic Depth (2014–2023)
  • Relations elevated to a Strategic Partnership (2017).
  • Creation of the Industrial R&D and Innovation Fund (I4F).
  • India joined the I2U2 grouping with Israel, UAE and USA.
Phase IV: Special Strategic Partnership (2024–Present)
  • New cooperation in AI, semiconductors, cyber and quantum tech.
  • India–Israel Cyber Centre of Excellence established.
  • Agreement to induct 50,000 Indian workers into Israeli sectors.

Why Israel Matters for India

  • Defense & Security: Israel provides advanced technology and crisis-time support.
  • Trade & Economy: Bilateral trade reached $3.62 billion in FY 2024-25.
  • Agriculture & Water: Israeli micro-irrigation and desert farming improve Indian food security.
  • Technology & Cyber: Joint cooperation in AI, cybersecurity and emerging technologies.
  • Space Cooperation: ISRO and Israel collaborate on satellite launches and research.

title: India’s Climate Goals and Renewable Energy Expansion
content: India continues expanding solar and wind capacity as part of its commitment under the Paris Agreement. The government is targeting 500 GW of renewable energy capacity by 2030.

title: Supreme Court Emphasizes Transparency in Governance
content: The Supreme Court recently highlighted the importance of transparency and accountability in government institutions to strengthen democratic governance.

title: India’s Digital Economy Expands Rapidly
content: Digital payments and online services are transforming India's economy, improving financial inclusion and enabling easier access to government services.

title: Urban Development and Smart Cities Mission
content: The Smart Cities Mission focuses on sustainable urban infrastructure, digital governance and improved quality of life in rapidly growing cities.

title: Inflation Trends in the Indian Economy
content: Inflation trends remain an important economic indicator. Policymakers monitor food and fuel prices closely to maintain economic stability.

title: India’s Manufacturing Sector and Make in India
content: The Make in India initiative aims to strengthen domestic manufacturing, generate employment and boost exports.

title: Digital Public Infrastructure and Economic Growth
content: India’s digital infrastructure including Aadhaar and UPI has become a global model for improving economic participation.

title: Agricultural Reforms and Farmer Income
content: Policy reforms aim to improve farmer incomes through better market access, storage infrastructure and crop diversification.

title: Editorial: Balancing Development and Environment
content: India faces the challenge of balancing economic growth with environmental sustainability and conservation.

title: Editorial: Strengthening Democratic Institutions
content: Strong institutions are essential for maintaining transparency, accountability and trust in democratic governance.

title: Editorial: Education Reforms for Future India
content: Education reforms focus on innovation, skill development and preparing youth for a rapidly changing global economy.

title: Editorial: The Importance of Federalism
content: India’s federal structure enables cooperation between the Union and states for effective governance.

title: India’s Forest Conservation Efforts
content: Forest conservation programs aim to protect biodiversity while supporting livelihoods for forest dependent communities.

title: Climate Change and Extreme Weather Events
content: Climate change is increasing the frequency of extreme weather events, making climate adaptation policies essential.

title: Wetland Protection and Biodiversity
content: Wetlands play a crucial role in biodiversity conservation and flood control.

title: Plastic Pollution and Sustainable Alternatives
content: Reducing plastic waste through recycling and sustainable materials is essential for protecting ecosystems.

title: E-Governance and Digital India
content: Digital platforms are improving transparency and efficiency in public service delivery.

title: Local Governance and Panchayati Raj
content: Local governments play an important role in rural development and democratic participation.

title: Civil Services Reforms
content: Administrative reforms aim to improve efficiency, accountability and citizen centric governance.

title: Public Policy and Welfare Delivery
content: Effective public policy ensures welfare schemes reach the intended beneficiaries.

title: The Legacy of the Freedom Movement
content: India’s freedom struggle shaped the values of democracy, justice and equality in the Constitution.

title: The Role of Women in the Freedom Struggle
content: Women leaders played a crucial role in India’s independence movement and social reform movements.

title: Ancient Indian Universities
content: Institutions like Nalanda and Takshashila were major centers of learning in ancient India.

title: The Cultural Heritage of India
content: India’s diverse cultural traditions reflect centuries of social and intellectual exchange.

title: India’s Relations with the United States
content: India and the US continue to strengthen strategic and economic cooperation in the Indo-Pacific region.

title: India and the Quad Partnership
content: The Quad partnership promotes cooperation on security, infrastructure and technology in the Indo-Pacific.

title: India’s Neighbourhood First Policy
content: India prioritizes cooperation with neighbouring countries to promote regional stability and development.

title: India’s Role in Global Climate Diplomacy
content: India plays an active role in international negotiations on climate change and sustainable development.

title: Sansad TV Debate: Fake Currency and National Security
content: Experts discussed the impact of counterfeit currency on economic stability and internal security.

title: Sansad TV Discussion: Violence Against Women
content: The debate focused on strengthening legal mechanisms and social awareness to protect women.

title: Sansad TV Dialogue: Electoral Reforms
content: Panelists discussed transparency and reforms needed in the electoral process.

content: Parliamentary committees play a key role in reviewing legislation and government policies.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
content: This scheme aims to provide affordable housing for urban and rural households.

title: Ayushman Bharat Health Scheme
content: Ayushman Bharat provides health insurance coverage to millions of vulnerable families.

title: Skill India Mission

content: The scheme provides income support to farmers for improving agricultural productivity.

content: ISRO continues to achieve milestones in space exploration and satellite technology.

title: Women Empowerment and Education

title: Combating Child Labour

title: Community Participation in Social Development
